gpu_full.label: GPU max offload
gpu_full.description: `lms load --gpu max` (100% GPU offload). Weights on GPU; best throughput when estimated GPU memory fits host headroom (~6.8 GiB for qwen3.5-9b on this host).

gpu_offload.label: CPU-only (gpu off)
gpu_offload.description: `lms load --gpu off` (0% GPU). CPU RAM holds weights; use when max exceeds VRAM (e.g. gemma-4-26b @ 17.4 GiB) or measured matrix prefers it (qwen3.5-9b smoke: 63% vs 50%).

rationale: max offload 17.43 GiB exceeds 6.8 GiB headroom
try partial --gpu 0.39 before cpu-only
max offload 7.57 GiB exceeds 6.8 GiB headroom
try partial --gpu 0.9 before cpu-only
max offload 7.74 GiB exceeds 6.8 GiB headroom
try partial --gpu 0.88 before cpu-only
max offload 6.85 GiB exceeds 6.8 GiB headroom
try partial --gpu 0.95 before cpu-only
measured matrix leader preset: gpu_offload (63% pass)
measured results override estimate → prefer gpu_offload
max offload 5.75 GiB fits 6.8 GiB headroom
max offload 19.65 GiB exceeds 6.8 GiB headroom
try partial --gpu 0.35 before cpu-only
max offload 18.66 GiB exceeds 6.8 GiB headroom
try partial --gpu 0.36 before cpu-only
max offload 7.18 GiB exceeds 6.8 GiB headroom
try partial --gpu 0.95 before cpu-only
max offload 5.09 GiB fits 6.8 GiB headroom
max offload 4.16 GiB fits 6.8 GiB headroom
max offload 1.28 GiB fits 6.8 GiB headroom
measured matrix leader preset: gpu_full (38% pass)
max offload 6.18 GiB fits 6.8 GiB headroom

serve.reason: 8GB-class VRAM: unload between matrix cells; never parallel model loads
serve.contextLength: Keep default unless cell timeouts; then reduce via lms load -c for tight models
serve.kvCache: KV grows with context; estimates exclude long-context KV — reserve ~1.2 GiB headroom

matrixRules: Run one loaded model at a time (lms unload --all between cells)
Use lms load --estimate-only before adding new load profiles
Prefer measured matrix-summary.json over estimates when both exist
Models > headroom: test partial --gpu <ratio> as a third profile before cpu-only
